title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.260 - Assignee failing to file true inventory and give bond, court to issue citation
text:
426.260.  Assignee failing to file true inventory and give bond, court to issue citation. — Whenever it shall be made to appear to the court having jurisdiction that any assignee has neglected or refused, when required by law, to file a full and true inventory, or to give bond, as required by this chapter, the court shall issue a citation to such assignee to appear in court at the time therein specified, to show cause why he should not be dismissed from his trust.
(RSMo 1939 § 5764) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5654; 1919 § 650; 1909 § 923
